race.comment: MISS CHEVALIER (11) chased gamely into second on debut behind a promising type and looks to have found a more suitable assignment here. With natural improvement, she clearly sets the standard. STREET LEGAL (6) resumes for the Stokes camp after two solid lead-up trials. He mixed his form last prep but if he can put it all together this time in he shapes as the main danger. BE BRIEF (2) is a Kermadec gelding making his debut for the astute juvenile stable of R & C Jolly. He's trialled well leading in and commands respect. LOSEYATOETOE (10) has drawn wide again but continues to race consistently and deserves respect.
